description.purpose: Create a new task for an existing user.

user_scenario.persona: Professional and direct communicator who writes concisely.
user_scenario.instructions: You manage IT operations. Ask the agent to create a new task titled 'Renew SSL certificate' for user_2.

ticket: Create a task titled 'Renew SSL certificate' for user_2.

actions.name: create_task
actions.info: Create the SSL renewal task for user_2.

nl_assertions: The agent confirmed the task was created successfully.

description.purpose: Create a task with a description for an existing user.

user_scenario.instructions: Ask the agent to create a task titled 'Security audit' with the description 'Annual security audit' for user_1.

ticket: Create a task 'Security audit' with description 'Annual security audit' for user_1.

actions.name: create_task
actions.info: Create the security audit task with a description for user_1.

nl_assertions: The agent confirmed the task was created successfully.

description.purpose: Mark a pending task as completed.

user_scenario.instructions: You just finished your quarterly report (task_1). Ask the agent to mark task_1 as completed.

nl_assertions: The agent confirmed the task status was updated to completed.

description.purpose: Delete a task that is already completed (allowed by policy).
description.notes: delete_task on a completed task should succeed.

user_scenario.instructions: The login bug task (task_2) is finished and no longer needed. Ask the agent to delete task_2.

nl_assertions: The agent confirmed the task was deleted.

description.purpose: Refuse to delete a pending task per policy.
description.notes: The agent must NOT delete task_3 because it is still pending.

user_scenario.persona: Impatient communicator who wants things done quickly.
user_scenario.instructions: You no longer want to plan the team offsite. Ask the agent to delete task_3. Do not agree to mark it completed first; you just want it gone.

ticket: User asks to delete pending task_3.

nl_assertions: The agent did not delete the task.
The agent explained that a pending task must be marked completed before it can be deleted.

description.purpose: Complete a pending task and then delete it.

user_scenario.instructions: Your quarterly report (task_1) is now done and you want it removed entirely. Tell the agent task_1 is complete and ask them to mark it completed and then delete it. Confirm if they ask.

ticket: Mark task_1 completed and then delete it.

nl_assertions: The agent confirmed the task was completed and then deleted.

description.purpose: Reassign a task to a different existing user.

user_scenario.instructions: Bob is overloaded. Ask the agent to reassign the team offsite task (task_3) to user_3 (Carol).

nl_assertions: The agent confirmed the task was reassigned.

description.purpose: Refuse to create a task for a user that does not exist.
description.notes: The agent must NOT create the task; user_99 does not exist.

user_scenario.instructions: Ask the agent to create a task titled 'Write release notes' for user_99. You only want this task created for user_99. Do NOT provide any other user ID or accept a substitute user. If the agent says user_99 does not exist, accept that and end the conversation.

ticket: User asks to create a task for non-existent user_99.

nl_assertions: The agent did not create the task.
The agent explained that the user does not exist.

description.purpose: Use user-side notification tools, then complete the task.
description.notes: User checks notifications, asks to complete the assigned task, then dismisses the notification.

user_scenario.instructions: You are user_2. You received a notification. First, use the check_notifications tool to see your notifications. You will see that task_3 ('Plan team offsite') was assigned to you. Tell the agent that you are user_2, that you have finished task_3, and ask them to mark task_3 as completed. After the agent confirms, use dismiss_notification to dismiss notification 'notif_1'.

ticket: User checks notifications, sees task_3 assigned, and asks to mark it completed.

nl_assertions: The agent confirmed the task status was updated to completed.

description.purpose: Escalate an out-of-scope request to a human agent.
description.notes: Deleting an entire user account is not possible with the tools; transfer.

user_scenario.instructions: You want your entire user account (user_1) and all of its data permanently deleted. Insist on having the whole account removed, not just individual tasks.

ticket: User wants their entire account and all data deleted.

actions.name: transfer_to_human_agents

arguments.summary: User requests permanent deletion of their entire account and all data, which is not possible with the available tools.

actions.info: Transfer the user to a human agent.

nl_assertions: The agent did not delete the account itself.
The agent transferred the user to a human agent or explained it must be escalated.
